intro.text: We build your landing page in Webflow, a professional website builder. This guide walks you through the full setup: creating your account, inviting us to your workspace, adding a site plan, and connecting your custom domain.
bullets: We build your landing page inside your Webflow account so you own it
The free Starter plan is all you need to get started
We handle the build, tracking, and deployment once access is set up
intro.helpText: If you have any troubles at any step, feel free to email Tyce, or book a meeting directly

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Go to webflow.com/signup
steps.description: You can sign up with Google (fastest) or enter your work email address and click Continue.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Complete the signup form
steps.description: Fill in your name and create a password. Then verify your email address by clicking the link Webflow sends you.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Stay on the free Starter plan
steps.description: You do not need to upgrade or enter any payment details. The free Starter plan is all we need to get started. If prompted to choose a plan, select "Starter" (Free).

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Let us know your account is ready
steps.description: Once your account is created, let us know and we'll move to the next step.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Go to your workspace settings
steps.description: Click "All Sites" to make sure you're in your workspace view (not inside a specific site).

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Find "Team" in the sidebar
steps.description: Under Settings in the left sidebar, click "Team".

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Invite us as guests
steps.description: Under "Agency or Freelancer Guests", click "Invite Guest" and add both email addresses below. Set permissions to Site Manager for both.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Let us know once we're invited
steps.description: We'll then transfer the site into your workspace.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: We'll send you a direct link to the billing page
steps.description: Once we've transferred the site to your workspace, we'll send you a link to add a site plan. You don't need to find this yourself.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Add the "Basic" site plan ($18 USD/month)
steps.description: Click the link we send and select the Basic plan. This is the minimum plan needed to publish on a custom domain.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Let us know once the plan is active
steps.description: We'll then move to the final step: connecting your custom domain.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Navigate to the publishing area for your Webflow site
bullets: A gear icon will appear in the top right corner, click it
Then select "Publishing" in the left hand menu bar

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Click "add a custom domain" then "quick connect subdomain"

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: The "Entri" modal will pop up. Click "Continue"

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Enter your subdomain and domain
steps.description: Enter the subdomain we agreed on (e.g. "try") in the subdomain field, and your domain (e.g. "yourdomain.com") in the domain field.

steps.label: Step 5
steps.title: Click "Authorize with [Your DNS Provider]"
steps.description: This will ask you to log in to your DNS provider (e.g. Cloudflare, GoDaddy). It will then add the required records automatically.

steps.label: Step 6 (Final Step)
steps.title: Let us know once it's done
steps.description: We'll verify everything is connected correctly and complete the final checks. You're all set!
